[thecreative_linkinbio.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26257934/thecreative_linkinbio.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>the. creative</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: #fff;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  .bg {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 0;
    background: #fff;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .blob {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 50%;
    filter: blur(80px);
    opacity: 0.35;
  }
  .blob1 { width: 500px; height: 500px; background: #f72585; top: -150px; left: -150px; animation: float1 8s ease-in-out infinite; }
  .blob2 { width: 400px; height: 400px; background: #7209b7; top: 30%; right: -100px; animation: float2 10s ease-in-out infinite; }
  .blob3 { width: 350px; height: 350px; background: #4cc9f0; bottom: -100px; left: 20%; animation: float3 9s ease-in-out infinite; }
  .blob4 { width: 300px; height: 300px; background: #f77f00; bottom: 10%; right: 10%; animation: float1 11s ease-in-out infinite reverse; }

  @keyframes float1 { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)} 50%{transform:translate(30px,-30px) scale(1.05)} }
  @keyframes float2 { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)} 50%{transform:translate(-20px,25px) scale(1.08)} }
  @keyframes float3 { 0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)} 50%{transform:translate(20px,-20px) scale(1.03)} }

  .container {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 480px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 48px 24px 60px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0;
  }

  .logo-wrap {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #fff;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(247,37,133,0.18), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .logo-wrap img {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    object-fit: contain;
  }

  .name {
    font-size: 26px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #1a1a2e;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .tagline {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #555;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .tagline span {
    color: #f72585;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .links {
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 14px;
  }

  .btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 16px 22px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.18s;
  }

  .btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
  .btn:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); }

  .btn-whatsapp {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25D366, #128C7E);
    color: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(37,211,102,0.30);
  }

  .btn-instagram {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f72585, #7209b7);
    color: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(247,37,133,0.30);
  }

  .btn-email {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4361ee, #4cc9f0);
    color: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(67,97,238,0.25);
  }

  .btn-icon {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .btn-icon svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    fill: #fff;
  }

  .btn-text {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1px;
  }

  .btn-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 400;
    opacity: 0.82;
  }

  .btn-title {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .btn-arrow {
    margin-left: auto;
    font-size: 18px;
    opacity: 0.7;
  }

  .footer {
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #aaa;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .footer strong {
    color: #f72585;
  }

  .pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    background: rgba(247,37,133,0.1);
    color: #f72585;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 99px;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(247,37,133,0.2);
  }

  .dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #f72585; animation: pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1} 50%{transform:scale(1.4);opacity:0.6} }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="bg">
  <div class="blob blob1"></div>
  <div class="blob blob2"></div>
  <div class="blob blob3"></div>
  <div class="blob blob4"></div>
</div>

<div class="container">

  <div class="logo-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="the. creative logo">
  </div>

  <div class="pill">
    <div class="dot"></div>
    Disponível para novos projetos
  </div>

  <h1 class="name">the. creative</h1>
  <p class="tagline">Design Gráfico · Identidade Visual · Social Media<br><span>Sua marca do jeito que ela merece ser.</span></p>

  <div class="links">

    <a class="btn btn-whatsapp" href="https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=5521969644199" target="_blank">
      <div class="btn-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="btn-text">
        <span class="btn-label">Fale comigo</span>
        <span class="btn-title">WhatsApp</span>
      </div>
      <span class="btn-arrow">→</span>
    </a>

    <a class="btn btn-instagram" href="https://www.instagram.com/eutitoneli/" target="_blank">
      <div class="btn-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="btn-text">
        <span class="btn-label">Me segue lá</span>
        <span class="btn-title">Instagram pessoal</span>
      </div>
      <span class="btn-arrow">→</span>
    </a>

    <a class="btn btn-email" href="mailto:jamiletitoneliemidio@gmail.com" target="_blank">
      <div class="btn-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v12c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="btn-text">
        <span class="btn-label">Me manda um e-mail</span>
        <span class="btn-title">jamiletitoneliemidio@gmail.com</span>
      </div>
      <span class="btn-arrow">→</span>
    </a>

  </div>

  <p class="footer">feito com carinho · <strong>the. creative</strong> © 2025</p>

</div>
</body>
</html>
